campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review transportation funding investments for March 2026, adopt a new policy restricting use of city property for federal civil enforcement activities, and discuss efforts to fill city job openings and improve employee retention.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New city policy prohibiting use of city property for federal civil enforcement
City job vacancies and employee recruitment and retention strategies

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing where residents could object to the city's plan to clean up hazardous conditions on certain properties identified by the County. The council then voted to approve moving forward with these cleanup orders and adopted a new policy on how the city handles technology-related disruptions.
keyTopics: Hazardous property abatement cleanup orders on County-identified properties
Public hearing for resident objections to the cleanup plan
New Technology Disruption Policy replacing previous city guidelines
Process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve routine meeting minutes, review the town's finances from March, and authorize several agreements including a paving contract and grant applications. The council also approved a list of projects planned for the upcoming fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approved financial and investment report for March 2026
Authorized construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Accepted donation of an automated external defibrillator (AED)
Approved grant applications for statewide funding
Adopted project list for fiscal year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to organize upcoming agendas and review committee work plans. The council cancelled their May 26 meeting and began planning the June 2 agenda by adding new items and setting time limits for discussions.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 meeting
June 2, 2026 draft agenda planning
Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan update
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan review
Council-sponsored events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select new members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. The council also reviewed upcoming agendas for various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection for 2026-27
Public comment period
Meeting minutes approval
Upcoming board and commission agendas

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, where they recognized Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The council reviewed minutes from April and conducted standard business procedures.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
April meeting minutes review

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council held a meeting where they discussed updates to the city's Health and Safety Element, which is part of their long-term community plan running through 2040. The council also recognized the Public Works Department for their work across multiple divisions during Public Works Week, and celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element update for the 2015-2040 General Plan
Public Works Department recognition (roads, sidewalks, trees, facilities, transportation, sustainability)
Asian American Pacific Islander Month celebration

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara Station Area Task Force held a special meeting on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss planning and development issues related to the station area. The meeting was open to the public both in person and online via Zoom.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting
Public meeting held at City Hall Council Chambers
Meeting accessible via Zoom for remote participation

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held several public hearings and made important decisions on May 19, 2026, including approving changes to city land-use rules, advancing a development project with permit amendments, and appointing a new permanent City Manager to lead the city.
keyTopics: New city ordinance changes (urgency measure and regular ordinance introduction)
Site development permit amendment and map approval for a construction project
Assessment confirmation and ordering (likely related to property taxes or fees)
Appointment of permanent City Manager

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to discuss efforts to help residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed a status update on these electrification programs and proposed principles to help the city comply with regional air quality regulations.
keyTopics: Residential electrification programs to replace gas appliances with electric alternatives
City compliance with Air District regulations on emissions
Proposed principles to guide how electrification assistance programs will work
Staff presentation and environmental review (CEQA) status
